features.name: OO
features.description: Provides tight dependency with On/Off cluster; enables command variants that link CurrentLevel and OnOff.

features.name: LT
features.description: Lighting-oriented level semantics: CurrentLevel 0x01=min, 0xFE=max, 0x00 forbidden, null=undefined.

features.name: FQ
features.description: Adds frequency-related attributes and behavior for level control.

action_facts.name: TempOptionsComputed
action_facts.description: Temporary Options bitmap computed from Options, OptionsMask and OptionsOverride

action_facts.name: MoveToLevelStarted
action_facts.description: A level transition initiated by MoveToLevel

action_facts.name: MoveInvalidRateZero
action_facts.description: Move command rejected because Rate was 0

action_facts.name: MoveEffectiveRateSelected
action_facts.description: Effective rate selected for Move command

action_facts.name: StepInvalidSizeZero
action_facts.description: Step command rejected because StepSize was 0

action_facts.name: StepTargetComputed
action_facts.description: Target level and duration computed for Step command

action_facts.name: LevelTransitionStopped
action_facts.description: Any ongoing level transition was stopped

action_facts.name: OnOffUpdatedFromLevel
action_facts.description: OnOff attribute updated due to level crossing min level

action_facts.name: ClosestFrequencySelected
action_facts.description: Closest supported frequency selected for MoveToClosestFrequency

action_facts.name: StartupOccurred
action_facts.description: Device powered up or rebooted, startup behavior executed

action_facts.name: StartupCurrentLevelForcedMin
action_facts.description: StartupCurrentLevel value 0, CurrentLevel set to device minimum

action_facts.name: StartupCurrentLevelForcedValue
action_facts.description: StartupCurrentLevel non-null and non-zero, CurrentLevel set to specified value

action_facts.name: ExecuteIfOffEvaluated
action_facts.description: ExecuteIfOff option evaluated in context of current OnOff value

states.name: OffState
states.description: OnOff cluster off; CurrentLevel may be at any allowed level; physical device output off

states.name: OnState
states.description: OnOff cluster on; physical device output on at CurrentLevel

transitions.description: On power-up, if StartUpCurrentLevel is null, restore previous CurrentLevel
On power-up, if StartUpCurrentLevel is 0, set CurrentLevel to device min level
On power-up, if StartUpCurrentLevel is a non-zero value, set CurrentLevel to that value
If ExecuteIfOff=0 and device is off, MoveToLevel does not change level or on/off
If ExecuteIfOff=1 and device is off, MoveToLevel updates CurrentLevel but leaves device off
When device is on, MoveToLevel adjusts level and keeps device on
Move rejected with INVALID_COMMAND if Rate is 0

transitions.guard_condition: rate != 0 && execute_if_off == 1 && onoff == FALSE && move_mode == Up
transitions.description: If ExecuteIfOff=1 and device is off, Move up updates CurrentLevel to maximum but leaves device off
When device is on, Move up raises level to maximum and keeps device on
When device is on, Move down lowers level to minimum but does not turn the device off
Step rejected with INVALID_COMMAND if StepSize is 0
Step adjusts CurrentLevel by StepSize over TransitionTime, clamped to min/max
Stop terminates any in-progress level transition and sets RemainingTime to 0
If device is off, MoveToLevelWithOnOff turns it on and sets level to target
When device is on, MoveToLevelWithOnOff sets level to target and keeps it on
If device is off, MoveWithOnOff up turns it on and sets level to maximum
If device is off, MoveWithOnOff down sets CurrentLevel to minimum but device remains off
When device is on, MoveWithOnOff up raises level to maximum and keeps device on
When device is on, MoveWithOnOff down lowers level to minimum and turns the device off
StepWithOnOff behaves like Step and then updates OnOff based on resulting level
StopWithOnOff behaves identically to Stop but applies to 'with On/Off' transitions as well
MoveToClosestFrequency selects the closest supported frequency and updates CurrentFrequency
MoveToClosestFrequency responds with CONSTRAINT_ERROR when no suitable frequency can be approximated

state_bound.name: temp_options
state_bound.source: computed from Options, OptionsMask and OptionsOverride
